question_text:
Propose a synthesis of the following molecule from succinic acid. You have at your disposal any reagents containing four carbons or fewer. (Hint: A good synthetic route takes advantage of the symmetry present in the target molecule.) O=C(CC1(C)C(OCC=C)=O)C(C(OCC=C)=O)(C)CC1=O

Use the structured benchmark context below as the full task specification.
Return the best chemistry answer grounded only in this context.

<benchmark_context>
{
  "level": "C",
  "task_family": "Multi-Step Synthesis Planning",
  "task_subtype": "route_design",
  "difficulty": "hard",
  "coverage_tags": [
    "route_design",
    "key_intermediates",
    "reagent_constraints"
  ],
  "benchmark_suite": "C",
  "benchmark_subtrack": "C3",
  "planning_horizon": "route_level",
  "task_mode": "open_planning",
  "difficulty_proxies": [
    "route_depth",
    "constraint_satisfaction",
    "key_intermediate_selection"
  ],
  "eval_contract_id": "legacy_eval_contract.full_synthesis.v1",
  "expected_output_schema": "route_design_plan",
  "judge_rubric_id": "g_eval.full_synthesis.v1",
  "input": {
    "question_text": "Propose a synthesis of the following molecule from succinic acid. You have at your disposal any reagents containing four carbons or fewer. (Hint: A good synthetic route takes advantage of the symmetry present in the target molecule.) O=C(CC1(C)C(OCC=C)=O)C(C(OCC=C)=O)(C)CC1=O"
  }
}
</benchmark_context>
student_answer: Step 1: Succinic acid → succinyl chloride (SOCl₂), then double Stork enamine acylation with 2 equiv enamine of acetaldehyde (pyrrolidine), followed by hydrolysis and intramolecular aldol cyclization → 1,4-cyclohexanedione | Step 2: 1,4-Cyclohexanedione + LDA (2 equiv, −78 °C, thermodynamic enolate) → bis-enolate at C3 and C6 | Step 3: Bis-enolate + methyl chloroformate (2 equiv) → 3,6-bis(methoxycarbonyl)cyclohexane-1,4-dione | Step 4: 3,6-Bis(methoxycarbonyl)cyclohexane-1,4-dione + LDA (2 equiv), then MeI (2 equiv) → 3,6-dimethyl-3,6-bis(methoxycarbonyl)cyclohexane-1,4-dione | Step 5: Transesterification with allyl alcohol (cat. p-TsOH, toluene, reflux) → 3,6-dimethyl-3,6-bis(allyloxycarbonyl)cyclohexane-1,4-dione (target)
